title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 23: Geng-sang Chu
description: Chapter 23 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 23 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Among the disciples of Lao Dan there was one Geng-sang Chu who had mastered a portion of the Way of Lao Dan and went north to live among the Wei-lei mountains.
